classificationModel.description: Four-layer taxonomy: Type → Lane → Domain → Function. All four must align for a name to be fully conformant.

lengthExceptions.name: powershell-script-library
lengthExceptions.justification: Full qualifier required to distinguish from audit-powershell and the powershell.instructions.md policy file.

lengthExceptions.name: test-driven-development
lengthExceptions.justification: Canonical industry term; abbreviating to tdd would reduce discoverability for new contributors.

lengthExceptions.name: usability-test-scripts
lengthExceptions.justification: Specificity required to distinguish from design-mobile-ux and prototype-mobile-ui.

notes: All governance routines must use the governance- prefix.
Canonical routine names must be short and visually discoverable by purpose (executive, type, item).

Planning.intent: Analyze intent, design, research, decide; outputs are plans, maps, decisions, or specifications.
Planning.note: Vocabulary drift to Execution or Review verbs in a Primary=Planning asset is a signal requiring catalog justification.

Execution.intent: Build, generate, transform, produce concrete artifacts; outputs are code, docs, config, scripts, or applied changes.
Execution.note: Vocabulary drift to Planning or Review verbs in a Primary=Execution asset is a signal requiring catalog justification.

Review.intent: Evaluate, validate, audit, assess, remediate; outputs are findings, scores, dispositions, or forecasts.
Review.note: Vocabulary drift to Execution verbs (e.g. 'write-') in a Primary=Review asset is a known exception requiring catalog justification.

data.note: Data domain overlaps with Engineering for Syrx assets; catalog lane assignment is authoritative.

ontology.description: Lightweight relationship model. Not encoded in file names. Used for authoring guidance and drift detection.
relationships: Asset ──operates-on──▶ Domain (Governance | Engineering | Mobile | Data | DevOps | Documentation | Meta-workflow)
practicalUses: Authoring: pick a verb from the target lane's vocabulary, pick a noun from the target domain's keywords.
Drift detection: a skill whose name uses a Review verb but whose catalog lane is Execution is a drift signal requiring justification.
Discovery: lane + domain together allow finding assets without reading every catalog row.
